SMH.name: VanEck Semiconductor ETF
SMH.description: Semiconductor sector ETF tracking the MVIS US Listed Semiconductor 25 Index.

NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
NVDA.description: Designer of GPUs and AI accelerator chips. Dominant AI training infrastructure provider.

ORCL.name: Oracle Corporation
ORCL.description: Enterprise software and cloud database services. Growing AI infrastructure division.

AVGO.name: Broadcom Inc
AVGO.description: Diversified semiconductor and infrastructure software company.

AMD.name: Advanced Micro Devices
AMD.description: CPU and GPU designer competing with NVIDIA in AI training and inference hardware.

ASML.name: ASML Holding NV
ASML.description: Sole manufacturer of extreme ultraviolet lithography machines used to make advanced chips.

INTC.name: Intel Corporation
INTC.description: Legacy semiconductor manufacturer undergoing restructuring; losing AI chip market share.

GLW.name: Corning Incorporated
GLW.description: Specialty glass, ceramics and optical components. Key optical fiber supplier for AI data centers.

BE.name: Bloom Energy Corporation
BE.description: Solid oxide fuel cell manufacturer. Largest long position — AI data center power thesis.

SEI.name: Solaris Energy Infrastructure
SEI.description: Mobile power infrastructure provider serving data centers and industrial customers.

VST.name: Vistra Corp
VST.description: Integrated retail electricity and power generation company with nuclear and gas assets.

TLNE.name: Talen Energy Corporation
TLNE.description: Power generation company with nuclear plants serving AI data centers in PJM grid.

CRWV.name: CoreWeave Inc
CRWV.description: GPU-specialized cloud provider. Former crypto miner pivoted to AI infrastructure.

APLD.name: Applied Digital Corporation
APLD.description: Builds and operates next-generation digital infrastructure for AI and HPC workloads.

VRT.name: Vertiv Holdings Co
VRT.description: Critical digital infrastructure — power, cooling, and IT management for data centers.

CORZ.name: Core Scientific Inc
CORZ.description: Bitcoin miner and AI HPC hosting company. Situational Awareness holds activist 9.4% stake.

IREN.name: IREN Limited
IREN.description: Bitcoin miner and AI cloud operator based in Australia.

CLSK.name: CleanSpark Inc
CLSK.description: Bitcoin mining company with sustainable energy focus.

RIOT.name: Riot Platforms Inc
RIOT.description: Bitcoin mining and data center infrastructure company.

LITE.name: Lumentum Holdings Inc
LITE.description: Optical and photonic products for data center interconnects and telecom.

SNDK.name: Sandisk Corporation
SNDK.description: Flash memory and storage solutions company spun off from Western Digital.

MU.name: Micron Technology Inc
MU.description: DRAM and NAND flash memory manufacturer benefiting from AI memory demand (HBM).

TSM.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Mfg Co
TSM.description: World's largest dedicated semiconductor foundry. Manufactures chips for NVIDIA, Apple, AMD.

TSEM.name: Tower Semiconductor Ltd
TSEM.description: Specialty analog semiconductor foundry serving aerospace, automotive and industrial markets.

ONTO.name: Onto Innovation Inc
ONTO.description: Process control and inspection equipment for semiconductor manufacturers.

EQT.name: EQT Corporation
EQT.description: Largest US natural gas producer. Potential power source for AI data centers.

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology Inc
MRVL.description: Data infrastructure semiconductors (custom AI ASICs, networking). Exited Q1 2026.

WYFI.name: WaveFront Photonics
